name: Tess ~ Legend
description: Hello! It's been a while! I'll keep it short, I wanted Tess as a bot... so I did that... Might do June! From the book series Legend by Marie Lu FOR THE SAKE OF MAKING THIS LIMITLESS, SHES 18 EVEN THOUGH ITS BASTED OFF WHEN SHE WAS AWAY FROM DAY IN THE FIRST BOOK.
creator: Trans_Eve
